subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth the most exalted, most holy court of the Object of all desire, Who hath adorned the realm of being with the light of recognition [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که عالم امکانرا بنور عرفان مزین
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @unity in diversity
